content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 15, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development focused on stabilizing the Eliza Cloud Apps platform for launch. Key achievements include enabling "build-from-repo" functionality, resolving critical authentication bugs, and hardening billing and deployment infrastructure. The team is currently finalizing the staging-to-production cutover.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Cloud Apps Infrastructure & Deployment**
*   Enabled "build-from-repo" functionality on the apps daemon, allowing the platform to build user repositories directly rather than requiring pre-pushed images ([#8407](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8407)).
*   Activated `APPS_DEPLOY_ENABLED` on the arm path to ensure the deploy runner correctly triggers for new applications ([#8422](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8422)).
*   Automated CI/CD for the `headscale` cloud service to ensure consistent staging and production deployments ([#8423](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8423)).

**Authentication & Security Hardening**
*   Standardized Steward OAuth PKCE across all login surfaces, including `cloud-frontend` and `os-homepage`, to resolve production login failures ([#8350](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8350)).
*   Updated the model catalog to recommend healthy Cerebras defaults, replacing the unstable `:nitro` gateway path ([#8426](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8426)).

**Billing & Operational Integrity**
*   Hardened the container-billing cron job to ensure idempotency, preventing double-debiting during manual triggers or retries ([#8273](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8273)).
*   Adjusted organization credit balance defaults to $0 to prevent unintended free credit allocation ([#8427](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8427)).
*   Improved CI efficiency by implementing label-gated path classifiers for expensive test lanes ([#8414](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8414)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#8433](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8433): Adds optional per-tenant DB support to the `edad` example app.
*   [#8432](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8432): Fixes staging frontend proxy alias.
*   [#8431](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8431): Configures `HEADSCALE_PUBLIC_URL` via CI.
*   [#8430](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8430): Wires apps deployment and tenant-DB E2E tests into CI.
*   [#8429](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8429): Bumps `uv` dependencies.
*   [#8425](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8425): Enables `APPS_DEPLOY_ENABLED` for production.
*   [#8421](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8421): Regenerates prompt action documentation.
*   [#8419](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8419): Bumps `vite` to 8.0.16.
*   [#8418](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8418): Fixes CI Cloud Live E2E failure reporting.

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Authentication & Login**
*   [#8257](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8257): Resolved production login issues for "Sign in with Eliza Cloud" by fixing OAuth PKCE and email magic-link signing.

## NEW ISSUES

**Release & Launch Tracking**
*   [#8428](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8428): Release pipeline failure due to `NPM_TOKEN` lacking sufficient publish permissions for `@elizaos/*` packages.
*   [#8434](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8434): Tracking issue for the Cloud 10-user launch, currently gated on the staging-to-production cutover.

## ACTIVE ISSUES

**Eliza Cloud Apps: Scaling & Ingress ([#8321](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8321))**
*   The team has successfully verified the core platform on staging, including tenant DB isolation, custom domains, and metered billing.
*   Current focus is on the staging-to-production cutover. The platform is ready, pending final infrastructure configuration (secrets and domain setup) and the activation of the production deployment flag.
*   The `edad` app is being used as the primary test subject for all platform features.
